narrative:
Precinct Liberty West (precinct in Ross County) has 934 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a clear Republican lean of 7.8 percentage points.
